title: King & Country
writer: Evan Jones, John Wilson, J.L. Hodson
actors: Dirk Bogarde, Tom Courtenay, Leo McKern
plot: During World War I, Army Private Arthur James Hamp is accused of desertion during battle. The officer assigned to defend him at his court-martial, Captain Hargreaves, finds out there is more to the case than meets the eye.
awards: Nominated for 4 BAFTA 2 wins & 7 nominations total
